security.csp: default-src 'self' ipc: http://ipc.localhost; img-src 'self' data: asset: http://asset.localhost; connect-src 'self' ipc: http://ipc.localhost; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; script-src 'self'; font-src 'self' data:

bundle.shortDescription: Connection manager for SSH, SFTP, and RDP
bundle.longDescription: Navis is a cross-platform connection manager with SSH, SFTP, and RDP support, hierarchical connection folders, and a security-first managed credential vault.
